author: razorclients
content:
1)that is something we would be doing in the short term,the long term goal would be to merge execution-apis into eels
2)does have support
3)reagrding this there was quite the discussion 
- axuiliary apis also exposed on the [engine api](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/blob/main/src/engine/common.md#underlying-protocol). 
- the proposal for top up sync was missing the parts related to a chain-following edge case

the 2 documents ( document explaining current ETH-namespace method list on engine port, rationale, and candidates for removal and top-up sync should be circulated amongst the clients for more comment.
